Children’s fairyland is well past its sell by date with really out of date features. Lots of the items are dumped around the edges of the park.

This Fairyland is a magical spot for kids, full of whimsical storybook sets, gentle rides, and beautiful gardens. It's perfect for younger children to explore and use their imagination. Some areas feel a bit vintage, but that only adds to the charm. A wonderful affordable outing for families. Our 4 year old girl loved it.
